props.name: dotSize
props.description: Size of each dot in pixels.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between each dot in pixels.

props.name: activeColor
props.description: Color of dots when hovered or activated.

props.name: proximity
props.description: Radius around the mouse pointer within which dots react.

props.name: speedTrigger
props.description: Mouse speed threshold to trigger inertia effect.

props.name: shockRadius
props.description: Radius of the shockwave effect on click.

props.name: shockStrength
props.description: Strength of the shockwave effect on click.

props.name: returnDuration
props.description: Duration for dots to return to their original position after inertia.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the component.
